first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The score is the same, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are merely rephrasings of the same core points. The minor differences in summarizing years of experience (10+ vs 15+) or specific technologies fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in the candidate's university.
